data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Minimizes decision time by simplifying choices in the interface.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Optimizes click targets to enhance user interaction.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Designs to accommodate the user's short-term memory capacity.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Designs experiences to reflect familiar user patterns.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Creates visually appealing interfaces to enhance perceived usability.
